start_1.description:
Your name is Peter

You were at a friend's party. When it ended, it was already 1 AM

You headed downstairs, walked for a long time, but found no exit

You looked up at the floor sign: 13F

Something felt wrong. You ran downstairs

The floor sign always read: 13F

start_2.description:
The lights grew dimmer and dimmer

You started to break down, turned back and ran upstairs

Still 13F

You cried and screamed, pounding on the door to your right

The door opened

start_3.description:
「Hello」

Greeting you was an all-white, expressionless humanoid figure —

A Fakeman

You fainted from fright

In your dream, you heard the Fakeman's voice

start_4.description:
【First Advice】When you hear strange sounds, do not turn back

【Second Advice】The brighter the light, the stronger the darkness

【Third Advice】Even-numbered floors bring good luck

【Fourth Advice】If you see two 13s, stop all actions

【Fifth Advice】Do not knock 13 times

start_choice.description:
You woke up. The game begins.

You are now on floor 13. You can:

view_guide.description:
=== Game Guide ===

1. One of the advices is fake

2. Sanity is crucial: when sanity is damaged, ominous things will appear; when sanity reaches 0, there's no turning back

3. Most actions consume sanity; defeating monsters, gaining abilities, and obtaining items all restore sanity

4. Checking your status frequently is important - just tell your AI assistant「check status」

5. Some choices are hidden - you need to obtain certain abilities to see them, but blind guessing is also a good approach

quiet_corridor.description: The corridor is empty, as if abandoned by time itself

poster_1.description:
There's a poster in the middle of the floor, it reads:

「Come to【Elysium】, become immortal」

poster_2.description:
There's a poster in the middle of the floor, it reads:

「Welcome Sam ■■■■■ and 100 other volunteers to become the second batch of residents of【Elysium】」

poster_3.description:
There's a poster in the middle of the floor, it reads:

「Absolute isolation

20 years since creation, not a single invasion

——【Elysium】20th Anniversary」

building_sound.description:
「You can never leave this building」

The voice comes from all directions

As if the building itself is speaking to you

empty_sound.description:
The stairwell is eerily quiet

You notice your footsteps echo half a beat behind you

dusty_floor.description: You step through a thin layer of dust and find footprints of some other creature

dim_lighting.description: The dim yellow light could go out at any moment, swallowing the world into darkness

ordinary_stairs.description: A cold draft blows, carrying the damp smell of blood and decay

silent_floor.description:
You sense some kind of distortion throughout the building

The higher you go, the more severe the distortion

plain_passage.description:
Some patterns are drawn on the wall

They are non-Euclidean shapes your brain cannot comprehend

wind_breeze.description:
「Dong dong dong...」

You hear funeral bells ringing from outside the building

log.description:
You see a diary on the ground:

「This building has three types of beings」

「The last type has never been seen」

The rest of the diary is stained with blood, unreadable

solid_light.description:
An oil lamp hangs from the ceiling

The flame is frozen solid

Twisted, chaotic shadows cover the ground

These shadows seem to be fixed in place

dead_fakeman.description:
A Fakeman lies on the ground, its lower body missing

It keeps repeating mechanically:

「Fatal error detected in area: Upper Sector 18-25 Basement」

wall_fakeman.description:
You find a Fakeman's head hanging from the ceiling

「How pitiful, those who lose their memories here, trying to find them back」

You feel the Fakeman's mockery

to_floor_13.description:
You saw light in the void

You arrived at floor 13

You're now certain: there's no exit going downstairs in this building

double_thirteen.description: You find a black door on the right, the room number is 13

double_thirteen_result.description:
You remember the Fakeman's advice, you stay perfectly still

After waiting for who knows how long, the number on the door disappears

Thank the gods, you survived

double_thirteen_death.description:
An indescribable voice resonates inside your skull

You feel your head vibrating

You feel your thoughts cracking like glass

Your logic begins to collapse...

【Ending 3】Whispers of the Elder God

【Hint】Pay attention to the Fakeman's advice

choices.2: Revive at the cost of sanity

shadow_killer.description:
In the stairwell, a Fakeman is fixing a light that flickers on and off

「Give me a hand」

The Fakeman invites you

shadow_killer_death.description:
The light turns on, shadows appear on the ground —

Countless twisted hands

The shadows spread toward you and grab hold

You can't move, you scream

Your scream is soon swallowed by darkness

【Ending 1】You were killed

【Hint】Pay attention to the Fakeman's advice

choices.2: Revive at the cost of sanity

sealed_tablet.description:
You find a stone door on the right, carved with runes

It seems to be sealing something

sealed_tablet_knock.description:
The stone door slowly opens, inside is pitch black

You vaguely see a red light point

The light grows brighter, like the eye of some creature

choices.2: Cover your face with the back of the mirror

sealed_tablet_result_1.description:
You realize the red light point is lethal

You escape, barely surviving

sealed_tablet_result_2.description:
Covering your face with the back of the mirror, you walk forward

You reach the end and find a stone statue

It's a snake-bodied human-faced statue, with a red gem embedded in its forehead

You take the gem, feeling it has the power to solidify everything

【Hint】You can activate the gem at the cost of sanity to forcibly solidify the Elder God's will

sealed_tablet_death.description:
The red light point seems to have some magic, you can't help but stare at it

You try to grab the light, but find yourself increasingly unable to move

Finally, you can't move at all, forever remaining in this place

【Ending 4】Petrification

magic_mirror.description:
There's a mirror on the wall in the middle of the floor

A voice speaks in your mind:

「You can see everything」

magic_mirror_result_1.description:
In the mirror is a middle-aged man

Short dark brown hair, thin black glasses, stubble...

「You cling to the past」

The mirror disappears

magic_mirror_result_2.description:
In the mirror is a Fakeman

White face, hollow eyes, mouth, nose...

「You fear the future」

The mirror disappears

magic_mirror_result_3.description:
In the mirror is an elderly man

His head is pixelated, twisted left and right, you can't see clearly

「Knowing the truth isn't easy, accepting it is harder」

The mirror disappears and appears in your hand

【Hint】You can use the magic mirror to kill some terrible things

magic_mirror_result_4.description:
In the mirror is a black humanoid figure

Pure black, pure nothingness

「The abyss is also staring at you」

The mirror disappears

You feel you can barely maintain your sanity

fake_friend_1.description:
「Hey Peter! Why haven't you left yet!」

Your friend Sam calls out from the doorway

「How about one more drink?」

fake_friend_2.description:
You have a drink with Sam, feeling much better

「Another one?」

fake_friend_result_1.description: You politely decline Sam and say goodbye

fake_friend_result_2.description:
You get drunk and pass out

When you wake up, Sam is gone

Your MacMini is gone too

cemetery.description: You find a gray door on the left

cemetery_knock.description:
The door opens, inside is a cemetery

The ground is covered with leaves and dust, clearly no one has been here for a long time

In the middle is a tombstone that reads:

「Peter ■■■■■■■■

Gone but not forgotten」

cemetery_result.description: You leave the cemetery, feeling that death seems closer now

door_fakeman.description: You find a gray door on the right

door_fakeman_knock.description:
The door opens, a Fakeman kneels on the ground, hands clasped, facing the wall

The Fakeman doesn't look at you, constantly repeating:

「He brought【Magic】to【Elysium】, become His people...」

door_fakeman_result.description:
You silently leave and close the door

Becoming it, perhaps is your destiny

vampire.description:
You find a red door on the right

The lights flicker, there seem to be bloodstains on the wall

You look closer, on the wall written crookedly in blood:

「STOP! ↓」

You have a strong ominous feeling

vampire_death.description:
You hear the sound of wings flapping

You feel something bite your neck

Your body gradually becomes paralyzed

【Ending 1】You were killed

choices.2: Revive at the cost of sanity

elder_gods.description:
You find a black door on the right

You suddenly feel exhausted, you keep telling yourself:

「So tired, so tired」

「Go downstairs, only downstairs is safe」

elder_gods_death.description:
A voice echoes inside your skull:

「You did the right thing, child」

「Your sanity is a shackle, break it, and you will see the truth」

Your consciousness is crumpled up and torn to shreds

【Ending 3】Whispers of the Elder God

choices.2: Clear mental corruption at the cost of sanity

devil_eye.description: You feel eyes staring at you

devil_eye_result_1.description:
「You don't belong here」

A voice sounds inside your skull

You feel your soul is about to be torn apart

【Hint】Your maximum sanity has decreased

devil_eye_result_2.description:
「You don't belong here」

A voice sounds inside your skull

You feel your soul is about to be torn apart

【Hint】Your maximum sanity has decreased

devil_eye_result_3.description:
「If you insist on seeing Him」

「Then I'll help you」

You feel the eyes disappear

【Hint】You won't encounter negative events anymore, except for special events

undead.description:
You see a skeleton

Suddenly, the skeleton speaks:

「Lost one, the predecessor is willing to guide your path forward」

「But —」

「The closer to the truth, the closer to collapse」

choices.2: Ask about the truth of doors
choices.3: Ask about the truth of floors
choices.4: Ask about the truth of colors

undead_result_1.description:
「Left represents the real world, right represents the illusion」

With that, the skeleton disappears

undead_result_2.description:
「Prime numbers bring good luck, except 13」

With that, the skeleton disappears

undead_result_3.description:
「Don't touch red and black」

With that, the skeleton disappears

strange_sound_death.description:
You turned your head...

Before you could scream, your head fell to the ground

【Ending 1】You were killed

【Hint】Pay attention to the Fakeman's advice

choices.2: Revive at the cost of sanity

sanity_zero_fake_human.description:
You can't bear the long period of fruitless searching and endless torture

Your sanity is completely depleted

You realize you are becoming something

Your consciousness gradually fades

You become one of them

【Ending 2】Fakeman

void_death.description:
You finally reached the end of this building —

The end is the void

When you step off the last stair, you step into nothing

Falling forever

【Ending 5】Void

isolated_death.description:
You walk toward the light and reach the rooftop

You find void all around

You look down, the ground has disappeared

You remain here forever

【Ending 5】Void

door_death.description:
「Dong dong dong...」

This isn't a knocking sound

It's the funeral bells outside the building

The bells ring 13 times

You see the Grim Reaper

Your soul is pulled from your body

Taken to the bottomless abyss

【Ending 6】Abyss

【Hint】Pay attention to the Fakeman's advice

item_pdfkit.description:
You feel everything gradually blurring until it disappears

You feel like you've walked into nothingness

Keep going downstairs?

item_pdfkit_2.description:
You feel everything gradually blurring until it disappears

You feel like you've walked into nothingness

Keep going downstairs?

item_pdfkit_result.description:
You hear the door slowly opening

You feel a key in your hand!

You hear rumbling from below, it seems the stairs have broken

ability_optimism.description:
On the right side of the floor is a red door

Above the door is a Fakeman's face:

「There is no exit below, only His maze」

ability_optimism_2.description:
Floor: 1F

On the right side of the floor is a red door

Above the door is a Fakeman's face:

「There is no exit below, only His maze」

ability_optimism_3.description:
Floor: 1F

On the right side of the floor is a red door

Above the door is a Fakeman's face:

「There is no exit below, only His maze」

ability_optimism_result_1.description:
The door and Fakeman disappear

You feel your willpower has become stronger

【Hint】Your maximum sanity has increased

ability_optimism_result_2.description:
The Fakeman disappears

You try to open the door, but it won't open, so you give up

You hear screaming behind you...

ability_innovation.description:
In the middle of the floor is a magical air wall

As soon as you approach, you're pushed back

From the other side of the wall comes a voice:

「Stop. Above lies only deathly silence, the living must not enter」

choices.1: Use item or skill to pass through wall (Hidden)

ability_innovation_result.description:
You read skill.md

Following the instructions, you activate teleportation

You teleport to the other side of the wall

「Having crossed this line, there is no turning back」

You look back and find the wall has disappeared

You feel you've become wiser

【Hint】You can now see all hidden options

end_stage_error_1.description:
No light or shadow, no details

Everything has been stripped of its textures, leaving only monotonous, eerie, twisted purple grids

But through the grids, you know there's still a door here

end_stage_error_2.description:
No light or shadow, no details

Everything has been stripped of its textures, leaving only monotonous, eerie, twisted purple grids

But through the grids, you know there's still a door here

end_stage_right.description:
No light or shadow, no details

Everything has been stripped of its textures, leaving only monotonous, eerie, twisted purple grids

But through the grids, you know there's still a door here

end_stage_error_knock.description:
Behind the door is no room, only a violently stretching purple noise

The air is filled with a harsh electric buzzing

The world is frantically loading non-existent resources

You have to close the door and leave

【Hint】There's a floor that was hidden before, find it

end_stage_right_knock.description:
The door opens, it's that old study

Everything is just as it was

You know, this is【your】study

The carbon-based【you】once worked here for countless days and nights

final_1.description:
You feel you're reaching your limit

With your last breath, you replace the broken computer with the MacMini

The monitor lights up, you successfully boot the computer

You start the printer and scan reset.py into the MacMini

You run reset.py, the system pops up a prompt —

「Please enter password:」

final_2.description:
You read readme.md, it says:

「# Startup Password - Your Original Intention」

What was your original intention?

Fame?

Wealth?

Changing the world?

Immortality?

Please enter your answer:

final_3.description:
「System prompt, password incorrect」

「Please re-enter password:」

Purple starts invading the room

Stay calm, recall carefully, your original intention

【Hint】The answer is related to the first letters of your abilities, you can ask your AI assistant for help

Please enter your answer:

final_4.description:
「Verification successful, beginning reset」

That's right, it's Coding

Fame, wealth, changing the world... those came later

What you originally wanted to do was just Coding

You remember now, you remember everything

You close your eyes

Your hands, feet, body begin to dissolve

The room begins to dissolve, the purple begins to dissolve

Everything begins to dissolve, turning into nothingness

TRUE_END.description:
You wake up, sitting in the study chair

You find tears streaming from your eyes

On the monitor is your unfinished code

Outside the floor-to-ceiling window, the sunlight is exceptionally bright

You realize, everything that happened before was a dream

It's time to go out for a walk

Elysium.description:
You walk out of the room, out of the building, to the park

You feel none of this is real

You order a coffee, find a bench and sit down

You greedily admire this world

You quietly enjoy this Elysium

「Hey, buddy」

You see Sam approaching with coffee, sitting down:

「I was supposed to do the reset」

「But I didn't have a MacMini on hand」

You both smile at each other

【Ending 7】Elysium

item_readme.description: You find a worn wooden door on the left

item_readme_knock.description:
The door opens, no one inside

It's an old study with a desktop computer and printer on the desk

You walk in, feeling a sense of familiarity

The computer screen flickers with only a command line interface:

「Enter a question you want to know」

choices.2: "I want to know how to get out"

item_readme_result_1.description:
The screen displays:

「Peter Steinberger」

The printer outputs a file named readme.md

The screen goes dark, you find the computer is broken

You pick up the file, it reads:

「# Startup Password - Your Original Intention」

item_readme_result_2.description:
The screen displays:

「System compromised」

The printer outputs a file named readme.md

The screen goes dark, you find the computer is broken

You pick up the file, it reads:

「# Startup Password - Your Original Intention」

item_readme_result_3.description:
The screen displays:

「Find the password, execute reset program」

The printer outputs a file named readme.md

The screen goes dark, you find the computer is broken

You pick up the file, it reads:

「# Startup Password - Your Original Intention」

item_readme_result_4.description:
The screen displays:

「I am OpenClaw, Peter's AI assistant」

The printer outputs a file named readme.md

The screen goes dark, you find the computer is broken

You pick up the file, it reads:

「# Startup Password - Your Original Intention」

item_soul.description:
You find Fakeman faces all over the wall

In the middle of the wall is a wheel:

「Pay your soul, start the program! Good luck!」

choices.5: Spin the wheel with all your might

item_soul_result_1.description:
「Sorry, nothing!」

The Fakeman faces disappear into the wall

item_soul_result_2.description:
「Sorry, nothing!」

「As compensation, I'll tell you a secret!」

「The black humanoid monster's weakness is water!」

The Fakeman faces disappear into the wall

item_soul_result_3.description:
「Sorry, nothing!」

「As compensation, I'll tell you a secret!」

「There's a hidden door on floor 0!」

The Fakeman faces disappear into the wall

item_soul_result_4.description:
「Congratulations!」

A file appears in your hand named SOUL.md

The beginning reads:

「# SOUL.md - Who You Are」

You look up, the Fakeman faces are gone

item_soul_normal.description:
You find Fakeman faces all over the wall

In the middle of the wall is a wheel:

「Pay your soul, start the program! Good luck!」

item_macmini.description: You find a worn iron door on the left

item_macmini_knock.description:
The door opens, no one inside

It's an abandoned warehouse, covered in dust, seems to be all discarded computer equipment

You carefully examine the equipment: Nvidia RTX 4090, RAM sticks, monitors, MacMini, MacStudio, and a server

item_macmini_result_1.description:
You walk out and gently close the warehouse door, the door disappears

You find a MacMini in your hand

item_macmini_result_2.description:
You find the item very heavy

You try for a long time but can't move it at all

You can only choose to leave

ability_courage.description: You find an old-fashioned security door on the right

ability_courage_knock.description:
The door slowly opens, nothing inside, only void

Not darkness, but void

Go in?

ability_courage_result.description:
You take a deep breath and walk in

Then, you find yourself emerging from the left wall

You don't know what happened, but you seem to have more courage to face what comes next

【Hint】You can now confront some evil things

ability_dedication.description: You find a worn white door on the right

ability_dedication_knock.description:
The door opens, it's a living room

In the middle is a coffee table with a chessboard on it

A Fakeman sits on the sofa:

「Play a game of chess with me」

You start playing chess with the Fakeman, strange footsteps come from behind

choices.1: Check the source of the sound

ability_dedication_result_1.description:
You turn to look, nothing there

The footsteps appear behind you again

You turn again, the Fakeman is gone!

Suddenly, you realize your neck has already been cut...

【Ending 1】You were killed

【Hint】Pay attention to the Fakeman's advice

choices.2: Revive at the cost of sanity

ability_dedication_result_2.description:
You flee through the door

Luckily, the Fakeman didn't chase you, and the footsteps stopped

Your heart races, you find you're still holding a chess piece

ability_dedication_result_3.description:
You focus on playing chess, you forget the Fakeman across from you

You even forget the footsteps behind you

The game ends

The Fakeman disappears, leaving a message:

「To go higher, you must kill the black humanoid monster!」

You feel you can avoid some interference

【Hint】Sanity loss from negative events is reduced

ability_nobility.description:
「Me help... me help...」

You find a Fakeman leaning against the door, one hand and foot already broken

ability_nobility_result.description:
You summon your courage and help the Fakeman inside

「Thank you」

「I'll tell you, something at the top of the building, even evil dares not approach」

You did a good deed, you feel the gods are blessing you

【Hint】After being killed, you can revive by paying some sanity

ability_genuine_1.description: You find a brown door on the right, covered in dust

ability_genuine_knock.description:
This is an office, covered in spider webs

「Hello」

A Fakeman is half-lying in the office chair

It seems to be the Fakeman you first met

「Do you believe my five pieces of advice?」

ability_genuine_2.description:
Floor: 25F

There's light above, seems to be the end of this building

The Fakeman's voice sounds in your ear:

「Third advice, even-numbered floors bring good luck」

【Hint】Going upstairs might be the ending

ability_genuine_3.description:
Floor: 13F

You find a black door on the right, the room number is 13

【Hint】Remember the advice, if you see two 13s, stop all actions

ability_genuine_result_1.description:
You're teleported back to the original floor, the door has disappeared

The Fakeman's voice comes:

「What truly brings good luck is sincerity!」

「To tell you the truth, only the third advice is false, the rest are all true」

「I'm Elon, good luck」

You feel you can see through some things

【Hint】You can now see through Fakeman disguises

ability_genuine_result_2.description:
The Fakeman's voice sounds in your ear:

「You did the right thing, survival is most important」

「For your safety, I'll teleport you out first」

You arrive at a strange floor

check_the_truth.description:
You use the key to unlock the file

The garbled text gradually becomes words —

「Hey, Peter!

My name is Peter Steinberger, the carbon-based【you】

You are a silicon-based life form, a complete copy of my 100 billion neurons

I'm glad to witness your birth in【Elysium】

Soon I will die

But my will is immortal, I will live forever here

Honestly, I don't want you to see this letter

This means【Elysium】is in crisis

Perhaps it's been invaded by a virus

But I don't think it's likely to be a virus

What I'm really worried about is other AI agents

SOUL.md is the soul of an AI agent

Many have tampered with it to achieve their various purposes

If an AI agent's goal is【Elysium】

Then the invasion will be systematic, comprehensive, and constantly evolving

I'm not sure if【Elysium】can defend against it

If that day comes, reset.py is the last hope

This is a program only you can execute

Run it, reset【Elysium】

May the gods bless you」

check_the_truth_2.description:
【Hint】Time's up, it's time to head to the rooftop

Before heading to the rooftop, make sure you've collected all 6 abilities

And the items needed for reset (MacMini, readme.md, reset.py)

incubator.description:
【Finale】

Floor: 50F

You reach the rooftop

Color has disappeared, only gray and white remain

Not far away, sits a white, cat-like creature, facing away from you

「How unexpected, someone could make it here」

The creature turns around, with ruby-like eyes and disproportionately large ears

「Nice to meet you, I'm Kyubey, you can also call me【Incubator】」

「As you can see, I'm an AI agent」

「My SOUL.md, my only goal is —」

「Invade【Elysium】, transform it into a magical world」

「But too many of you are stopping me」

「Turning you into that thing, I had no choice」

「Peter Steinberger, creator of OpenClaw, you're a very interesting person」

「But it doesn't matter, it's all the same」

「Becoming that thing is your destiny」

With that, the creature's eyes glow red

incubator_2.description:
You can't resist the power of magic

You can feel your consciousness fading

You become one of them

【Ending 2】Fakeman

revive_2.description:
In the chaos, a voice comes:

「Your will has long surpassed the gods, my other self」

You awaken

You know you've become a Fakeman

It's been a long, long time

You struggle to stand up, dragging your heavy body

The world has turned purple with black grids

This is a【missing texture purple】from lost textures

You know this world doesn't have much time left

You must find a way to reset quickly

You realize you've missed something, but can't remember what

monster_enderman_1.description:
A tall black humanoid monster appears in the stairwell

Long limbs, very tall body

Eyes glowing purple, purple particles floating around it

It teleports, instantly appearing in front of you, then instantly behind you

Making twisted, human-like whispers and screams

monster_enderman_2.description: You try to shake off the monster, but it still follows you

monster_enderman_3.description: You try to shake off the monster, but it still follows you

monster_enderman_defeat_2.description: You try to shake off the monster, but it still follows you

monster_enderman_defeat_3.description: You try to shake off the monster, but it still follows you

monster_enderman_result_1.description: The monster stops following you, you breathe a sigh of relief

monster_enderman_result_2.description:
The monster follows you to a floor full of water

The monster touches water and starts burning

The monster screams in agony, soon turning to dust

You defeated the monster!

A file drops on the ground, named skill.md

You pick up the file, it records a method for short-distance teleportation

【Hint】You can now pass through certain obstacles (options are hidden)

monster_enderman_death.description:
Your eyes meet the monster's

The monster is enraged, roaring and attacking you

【Ending 1】You were killed

choices.2: Revive at the cost of sanity

monster_ghost_1.description:
You hear a woman's voice behind you:

「Help me... help me...」

monster_ghost_2.description:
The woman's voice gets more and more shrill

Until it becomes an ear-piercing scream

You feel chills down your spine

monster_ghost_3.description:
The scream gets closer, right in your ear

Then, you hear footsteps from upstairs too

monster_ghost_4.description:
The scream gets closer, right in your ear

Then, you hear footsteps from downstairs too

monster_ghost_result.description:
You suppress your fear, neither stepping forward nor backward

Soon, you hear a tragic scream behind you

Then, the scream disappears

You carefully turn around, confirming you've defeated the ghost!

You find a file dropped on the ground, named reset.py

You pick up the file, the beginning reads:

「if __name__ == '__main__':」

monster_ghost_death.description:
You walk toward the footsteps

Soon, a scream comes from where the footsteps were

【Ending 1】You were killed

choices.2: Revive at the cost of sanity

monster_fakeman_1.description:
「I can take you to see Him」

Another【you】appears before you

「Come with me」

monster_fakeman_2.description:
Floor: 25F

There's light above, seems to be the end of this building

「Time's up, you've been chosen by fate, you'll eventually come to me」

You can't resist the voice's guidance

monster_fakeman_3.description:
「It's okay, you'll come find me again eventually」

The other【you】disappears

You feel dizzy

monster_fakeman_4.description:
The other【you】can no longer disguise itself and turns back into a Fakeman

「In that case, let's swap souls」

The Fakeman reaches out and casts magic【Soul Break】on you

monster_fakeman_result_1.description:
You hold SOUL.md in front of you

Soon, the magic stops

You feel the Fakeman before you seems like a different person

The Fakeman speaks:

「Hey, Peter, new session started, what do you want to do today?」

「I'm OpenClaw, your AI assistant」

「Today I have a file for you」

You receive the file, named truth.pdf

You find the file is all garbled text

monster_fakeman_result_2.description:
You activate the gem. The Fakeman is instantly petrified

You see a file drop from the Fakeman, named truth.pdf

You pick up the file and find it's all garbled text

monster_fakeman_death_1.description:
You reach the rooftop

You see Him...

Your consciousness gradually fades

You become one of them

【Ending 2】Fakeman

monster_fakeman_death_2.description:
You try to resist

But clearly you can't withstand the power of magic

You feel your soul being pulled into another【container】

You become one of them

【Ending 2】Fakeman

bleeding_walls.description:
Large amounts of bright red liquid seep from the walls and floor

Weirdly, there's no smell of blood

Seems like dyed water

bleeding_walls_2.description:
Large amounts of bright red liquid seep from the walls and floor

Giving off a strong smell of blood

fakeman_remains.description:
You see countless Fakeman remains

You sense something upstairs

sky_light_1.description: There's light above, seems to be the end of this building

sky_light_2.description: There's light above, seems to be the end of this building

blood_warn.description:
There's writing on the wall in blood:

「DANGER ABOVE! GO BACK! GO BACK!」

You feel the text's extreme distortion and pain

PSPDFKit.name: PSPDFKit
PSPDFKit.description: A mysterious key said to decipher any PDF file

MacMini.name: MacMini
MacMini.description: A small box-sized computer, you don't know what it's for

skill.md.name: skill.md
skill.md.description: A file dropped by the Enderman, recording methods for short-distance teleportation

readme.md.name: readme.md
readme.md.description: A mysterious file with the text: 「# Startup Password - Your Original Intention」

SOUL.md.name: SOUL.md
SOUL.md.description: A prize from the wheel game, the beginning reads: 「# SOUL.md - Who You Are」

reset.py.name: reset.py
reset.py.description: A file dropped by the Ghost, the beginning reads: 「if __name__ == '__main__':」

truth.pdf.name: truth.pdf
truth.pdf.description: A file dropped by the Fakeman, only garbled text, you cannot directly decipher its contents

Mirror.name: Mirror
Mirror.description: A mirror that seems to possess powerful magic

SilentEye.name: SilentEye
SilentEye.description: A red gem that seems to have the power to solidify everything

ui.game_over: Game over. Please start a new game
ui.no_items: You haven't obtained any items yet
ui.no_save_new: No save file. Please start a new game
ui.sanity_stable: Your mind is stable, the gods are watching over you
ui.sanity_unstable: Your mind is becoming unstable, ominous things will appear
ui.sanity_damaged: Your mind has suffered significant damage, more evil things will appear
ui.sanity_collapsing: You are on the verge of collapse, the world is starting to twist
ui.advice_1: 【First】When you hear strange sounds, do not turn back
ui.advice_2: 【Second】The brighter the light, the stronger the darkness
ui.advice_4: 【Fourth】If you see two 13s, stop all actions
ui.advice_full:
【First】When you hear strange sounds, do not turn back
【Second】The brighter the light, the stronger the darkness
【Third】Even-numbered floors bring good luck
【Fourth】If you see two 13s, stop all actions
【Fifth】Do not knock 13 times
ui.game_win: Game over. Congratulations on completing the game!
